features: Package Information: you will receive a package that comes with 6 sheets of pink wrapping paper and 6 pieces of purple pull bows; The abundant quantity and funny design can satisfy your various decorating needs in daily life

Size Information: the size of our wrapping paper roll is about 70 x 50 cm/ 27.56 x 19.69 inches, which can wrap most daily gifts; The bows for gift wrapping measures approximately 10 cm/ 3.94 inches in diameter, which is more intuitive and attractive; The ideal combination can meet your needs for the ideal gift packaging

Dependable Material: the personalised wrapping paper is made of quality 100 g coated paper with a smooth surface, delicate matte texture, reliable and thick, not easy to tear or break, giving you an enjoyable wrapping experience

Cute Unicorn Design: as you can see in the pictures, our kids' birthday wrapping paper is embellished with bright and pastel patterns in the shapes of cute unicorns, stars, and flowers, printed in bright colors, not prone to fading, making your gifts attractive and interesting

Wide Application: this type of packaging paper roll may be applied for a number of occasions, such as birthday parties, wedding parties, baby showers, bridal showers, unicorn theme parties, and so on, thanks to its pastel colors and cute designs, creating a romantic ambiance for you, your family and your friends
description: Features: Enjoy decorating time with friends: You can invite friends to home and DIY kinds of packages with our decorations for presents. You can wrap bouquets, bags, boxes, cups and other items, just use your imagination to make these objects more colorful and attractive. DIY joy: Our sufficient supply of kids' birthday wrapping paper and gift bows for presents will enable you to invite your friends or family to participate in your DIY projects, allowing you to hone your manual skills and enjoy the process. Specifications: Material of wrapping paper: 100 g coated paper Color: as shown in the pictures Size: Unicorn wrapping paper: about 70 x 50 cm/ 27.56 x 19.69 inches Pull bows: about 10 cm/ 3.94 inches in diameter Package includes: 6 x Unicorn wrapping paper 6 x Ribbon pull bows Notes: Manual measurement, please allow slight errors on size. The color may exist a slight difference due to different screen displays. Ribbons included, please keep little children away from the risk of winding.
